records.message: We can't accept the No you entered for Dangerous Goods Regulations. To fix this, select an approved value from the list for your product category and resubmit.

records.message: 'Item depth Unit' is required but missing.
records.rule_hint: 模板专属条件必填：当模板包含 item_depth_width_height 字段，且该 product_type/模板触发本体尺寸时，Item Depth/Height/Width 的数值和单位必须成对填写；不要套用到没有这些字段的模板。
records.note: Item Depth/Height/Width 这类本体尺寸字段需要数值和单位成对填写；BOOK_DOCUMENT_STAND 触发 Item Depth Unit 条件必填。
